channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: 'The false attributions were the direct product of Koi’s unsupervised reliance': Startup sues Koi Security after AI tool hallucinates and links it to a Chinese spying scam
item.description: MeetingTV sues Koi Security over alleged AI-generated false claims linking its software to Chinese cybercrime, causing reputational and business damage.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Sunday, July 12 (game #1630)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Sunday, July 12 (game #1127)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Sunday, July 12 (game #861)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: How to watch UFC 329: McGregor vs Holloway 2 live streams, no PPV, start time, full card
item.description: Follow our guide to live stream UFC 329 online and watch Conor McGregor vs Max Holloway 2 from anywhere.

item.title: Is this the open source printer of our dreams? Raspberry Pi-powered, DRM-free 'Open Printer' inkjet could be the perfect solution if it ever sees the light of day
item.description: Open Tools develops a repairable open source printer using Raspberry Pi hardware, challenging DRM restrictions while facing cartridge and production challenges.

item.title: How to watch Argentina vs Switzerland: Free Streams, TV Channels & Kick-Off time for FIFA World Cup 2026 as Lionel Messi eyes quarter-final progress
item.description: Here's how to watch Argentina vs Switzerland for free online and from anywhere as Lionel Messi leads his side in this FIFA World Cup 2026 quarter-final.

item.title: This slushie machine was a lifesaver during NYC’s heat wave
item.description: Last weekend’s brutal NYC heat wave had me craving a frozen drink almost every afternoon. Normally, that would mean sweating through a walk to 7-Eleven for a slurpee. This time, though, I stayed home and put the new Ninja Slushi Twist to the test. Ninja’s latest slushie machine builds on the popularity of the original […]

item.title: 'It's not really enjoyable to make music now': Quote of the day by CEO of AI music generator Suno, Mikey Shulman — a faux pas with serious ramifications
item.description: The rise of AI threatens the arts just as much as any industry – with large language models able to generate all kinds of media
